title: EXPLAIN FORMAT=TREE does not say the index is covering, unlike plain EXPLAIN
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3 (a INT, b VARCHAR(255), c DATE, PRIMARY KEY(a));
CREATE TABLE t4 (d INT NOT NULL, e FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0, FOREIGN KEY (d) REFERENCES t3(a));
INSERT INTO t4 (d, e) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 3.14);
SELECT a FROM t3 WHERE b IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: EXPLAIN FORMAT=TREE fails to indicate covering index
